title: cypholophus nummularis
intro: Cypholophus nummularis, also known as the coin fern or coin-leaved cypholophus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Cypholophus nummularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
